channel.title: Qemu on m0nkeyc0de's brain dump
channel.description: Recent content in Qemu on m0nkeyc0de's brain dump

item.title: Run Windows 11 IoT with QMU
item.description:
Sometimes you absolutely need Windows to run a piece of software. This page explains how to run Windows 11 IoT LTSC into QEMU. This can be achieved in less than 30 minutes.

QEMU and networking

In NetworkManager, create a bridge named bridge0 and select Share with other computers in the IPv4 section. Bring this connection up.

Once installed, run your W11 virtual machine that way (as no TPM is needed, the W10 way works):
